summary: Plan-only classification for five open PRs. No merge is recommended because no item has complete merge preflight with current mergeability, resolved review/bot state, and passed Codex /review proof. Two small maintainer-modifiable PRs look independently promising but cannot safely be emitted as fix actions from the provided artifacts because there is no complete executable fix_artifact; three PRs need maintainer judgment because live labels/checks show waiting-on-author, failed real-behavior proof, or broader feature/API scope.

actions.reason: Do not emit a fix action without a complete executable fix_artifact. Maintainer can independently refresh mergeability against current main, inspect/resolve bot review state, run Codex /review, and validate the touched outbound/cron tests before reconsidering merge.
Maintainer should decide whether to keep waiting for author proof, request a repair, or split/rebuild the memory-core fix.
Human product/API judgment is needed before finalization because this adds a new plugin SDK hook and Discord emit points while proof is failing and author follow-up is active.
